role.heading: Which portal do you want to use?
role.body: Choose your role so the app can show the right dashboard and legal workflow.
role.recommendedTitle: Workers should usually start with the Worker portal
role.recommendedBody: It opens digital ID, dues, grievances, voting, rights guidance, and union contact from one place.
role.chooseBody: Each menu opens a different workflow. Pick the path that matches your current role, not just the information you want to read.
role.workerMeta: Starts with a short Form C-aligned intake so the app can guide you safely.
role.unionTitle: Are you a union office bearer?
role.unionMeta: For General Secretary, Finance Secretary, and authorized union office staff.
role.helpTitle: Do you need help or information?
role.helpMeta: Open rights guidance without creating a worker profile.
role.guidanceBody: This app is built for workers who need quick mobile access and union office bearers who need dense operational tools without desktop screens.
role.coBrand: Built with Fruit of Sustainability for PUWF

auth.subtitle: Secure access for authorized office bearers to manage memberships, dues, and legal compliance.
auth.forgotPassword: Forgot password? Contact PUWF Head Office.

onboarding.flowTitle: Short survey for your worker profile

routeHints.standard: After the survey, we will open the safest next screen for your profile status.
routeHints.grievance: Because you selected urgent help, the app will open grievance filing after this survey.

workerStatus.title: What kind of worker are you?
workerStatus.description: This helps us decide whether the Worker portal or guidance library is the right first step.

unionMembership.title: Are you already a union member?
unionMembership.description: Membership status affects digital ID, dues, voting, and grievance follow-up.

fullName.title: What is your full name?
fullName.description: Use the name you use in union or employer records.

fatherName.title: What is your father name?
fatherName.description: This supports Form C-style identity matching.

cnic.title: What is your CNIC number?
cnic.description: CNIC is used for worker identity matching and will be masked in display screens.

mobile.title: What is your mobile number?
mobile.description: This will later support OTP, notices, and grievance updates.

employer.title: Who is your employer?
employer.description: Enter the employer, company, or department that pays or supervises your work.

establishment.title: Where do you work?
establishment.description: Enter the factory, office, plant, site, or establishment name.

designation.title: What is your designation?
designation.description: Examples include cleaner, machine operator, driver, clerk, guard, or technician.

department.title: Which department or posting place?
department.description: This helps your union identify the right unit or workplace location.

district.title: Which district do you work in?
district.description: District helps connect your case to the correct union or region.

city.title: Which city or area?
city.description: Add the city, town, or local area where you usually work.

province.title: Which province?
province.description: Province helps route future legal and union workflows correctly.

urgency.title: Do you need urgent grievance help?
urgency.description: Choose urgent if there is termination, non-payment, harassment, safety danger, or immediate pressure.

language.title: Which language should the app use?
language.description: You can change this later from the language button.

answers.activeMember: Yes, I am a union member
answers.notMember: No, I am not a member

answerDescriptions.factoryWorker: I work in a factory, plant, company, department, or establishment.
answerDescriptions.otherWorker: I work, but I am not sure this portal matches my workplace.
answerDescriptions.notSureWorker: I need guidance before choosing the right portal.
answerDescriptions.activeMember: I am already connected with a union or worker body.
answerDescriptions.notMember: Show me rights and guidance first.
answerDescriptions.notSureMember: I am not sure if my name is in the member register.
answerDescriptions.urgent: Open grievance filing after this short survey.
answerDescriptions.notUrgent: Take me to my worker dashboard or guidance after setup.
answerDescriptions.notSureUrgency: Help me understand my rights first.
answerDescriptions.urdu: Use Urdu as the main language.

placeholders.department: Example: Zone V or production unit

validation.required: Please answer this step before continuing.
validation.mobile: Enter a valid Pakistan mobile number.

grievance.placeholder: Write your grievance clearly and briefly...

validation.description: Write at least 12 characters about the issue.

voting.auditNote: The voting record is retained for audit, while ballot identity remains protected.

union.searchMembers: Search by name, CNIC, or member ID
union.outsiderWarning: Outsider office bearers: {{count}}. Must stay within 25%.
union.attentionSubtitle: Compliance tasks and urgent workflow items
union.cbaSubtitle: CBA certificate and Charter of Demand workflow

states.error: We could not load this screen. Please try again.

actions.members: Form C registry, CNIC check, dues and election readiness.
actions.officeBearers: Form A Schedule 1, terms, outsider limit and evidence.
actions.documents: DMS, obligations, expiry and evidence packet.
actions.annualReturn: Open the statutory annual return workspace.
actions.finance: Dues, receipts, remittances, and finance prefill.
actions.more: Open elections, CBA, legal, documents, and office bearers.

more.subtitle: All admin modules
more.officeBearers: Executive body, term dates, outsider limit and Form A evidence.
more.documents: Compliance packet, source documents, DMS and expiry tracking.
more.elections: Schedule, nominations, voter readiness and result publication.
more.cba: Certificate status, Charter of Demand stages and negotiation timeline.
more.legal: Grievance queue, legal escalation and hearing logs.

annualReturn.title: Annual Return deadline
annualReturn.detail: Form L/J packet needs GS and FS review before submission.

formC.title: Form C completion gap
formC.detail: 158 member records need signature, CNIC or subscription evidence.

grievance.title: Urgent grievances
grievance.detail: 4 worker cases need same-day triage by the union desk.

cba.workspaceBody: Track bargaining certificates, renewal risk, Charter of Demands progress, negotiation rounds and settlement evidence from one mobile workspace.
cba.detailSubtitle: Certificate profile, readiness, linked CoD and history
cba.emptyRegistry: No bargaining records match this filter.
cba.emptyWorkflow: No active Charter of Demands workflow yet.
cba.emptyRounds: No negotiation rounds have been logged yet.
cba.emptyEvidence: No bargaining evidence is linked yet.
cba.searchPlaceholder: Search establishment, certificate, issuer or reference

form.subtitle: Certificate identity, validity, workforce coverage and determination basis

cod.formSubtitle: Demands, response, conciliation, arbitration and settlement posture
cod.noResponseNote: No management response note is recorded yet.

evidenceWarnings.mosBody: {{count}} bargaining file(s) still need MoS or settlement evidence.
evidenceWarnings.expiryBody: {{count}} certificate(s) are inside the 90-day renewal window.

validation.title: Enter a clear record title.
validation.employer: Enter the employer or management name.
validation.date: Enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.linkedCba: Link this workflow to a CBA record.
validation.demandCount: Add at least one demand item.
validation.settlementDate: Settlement date is required at settlement stage.
validation.mosReference: MoS reference is required at settlement stage.
validation.strikeDate: Strike notice date is required at strike notice stage.
validation.strikeExpiry: Strike notice expiry is required at strike notice stage.
validation.expiryOrder: Expiry date must be after the effective date.

members.subtitle: Form C aligned mobile registry
members.workspaceSubtitle: Registry, intake, review and lifecycle control
members.workspaceBody: Run the union registry from one mobile workspace: inspect compliance gaps, complete Form C, check election readiness, and record member lifecycle events.
members.batchHint: Batch actions can be applied after reviewing these records.
members.detailSubtitle: Identity, compliance, benefits and lifecycle record

review.formCBody: Records missing signature, thumb, address, or subscription evidence.
review.verificationBody: Members still pending NADRA/EOBI confidence or flagged by the registry.
review.duesBody: Workers whose dues status is blocking registry confidence and readiness.
review.electionBody: Records that cannot safely move into voter preparation yet.
review.annualReturnBody: Member records that still weaken year-end totals or compliance confidence.

intake.addBody: Capture identity, employment, membership, benefits, documents and lifecycle details in one guided mobile flow.
intake.importBody: Pick a roster file, preview duplicates and row errors, then confirm the import job.
intake.reviewBody: Jump from intake to the queues that still need signature, verification or dues follow-up.

validation.name: Enter the member's full name.
validation.fatherName: Enter parentage exactly as used in the registry.
validation.phone: Enter a valid Pakistan mobile number.
validation.age: Worker must be at least 18 years old.
validation.date: Enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.establishment: Enter the establishment or posting place.
validation.lifecycleNotes: Add a lifecycle note before saving.
validation.beneficiaryNeeded: Beneficiary fields are required for deceased members.
validation.duplicateCnic: This CNIC already exists in the registry.
validation.fixAll: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.

lifecycle.summaryBody: Record promotions, transfers, retirements, terminations and deceased cases with beneficiary follow-up.
lifecycle.recordBody: Capture the operational event that changes the member's registry status.
lifecycle.joinedBody: Initial registry event when the worker became part of the union record.
lifecycle.promotedBody: Designation or grade moved upward in the worker profile.
lifecycle.transferredBody: Posting place or department changed and the registry was updated.
lifecycle.salaryBody: Latest salary information updated for roster and benefits tracking.
lifecycle.convertedBody: Worker moved into a new employment arrangement inside the roster.
lifecycle.reinstatedBody: Member returned to active status after a break or dispute.
lifecycle.terminatedBody: Member marked terminated and excluded from active readiness counts.
lifecycle.retiredBody: Member retired from service and moved out of active lifecycle counts.
lifecycle.deceasedBody: Member marked deceased and beneficiary handling started.

import.title: Bulk import
import.subtitle: Roster preview, dedupe and import confirmation
import.flow: Pick a file, review mapping and duplicate warnings, then confirm the rows safe to import.
import.completed: Import job completed and ready rows were added to the registry.

issues.duplicate: Possible duplicate CNIC in existing registry.
issues.existingPending: Existing pending registry record already needs review.

elections.workspaceBody: Run the union election lifecycle from one dense mobile workspace: publish schedules, scrutinize nominations, monitor polling posture, and close results with office-bearer sync readiness.
elections.detailSubtitle: Election timeline, authority, and closure posture
elections.emptyRegistry: No election records match this filter.
elections.emptyNominations: No nomination records need scrutiny right now.
elections.emptyResults: No result or closure items are active right now.
elections.emptyDisputes: No registry objections or disputes are open right now.
elections.searchPlaceholder: Search election title, reference, officer, or date

nominationForm.title: Nomination intake
nominationForm.legalNote: Proposer and seconder must appear on the valid voter roll.

validation.date: Enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.title: Enter the election title.
validation.eligibleCount: Eligible voter count must be at least 1.
validation.scheduleOrder: Schedule dates must follow the legal election sequence.

office.workspaceSubtitle: Executive body registry, review, and history
office.workspaceBody: Manage the executive body from one mobile workspace: review Schedule 1 posture, track outsider ratio, watch expiring terms, and record resignations, replacements, and reinstatements.
office.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, CNIC, position, or contact
office.detailSubtitle: Identity, term posture, and governance history

historyNotes.resigned: Seat marked resigned in governance registry.

guardrails.outsiderBody: The outsider ceiling remains 25%. Show warning at 20% and block updates above the limit.
guardrails.womenBody: Track women-designated seats and women office-bearers before governance filings or election preparations.
guardrails.expiryBody: Seats expiring within 180 days should be reviewed before notices, filings, or elections.
guardrails.vacancyBody: Open positions in the official executive body should be visible before governance sign-off.

validation.name: Enter the office-bearer's name.
validation.phone: Enter a valid Pakistan mobile number.
validation.date: Enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.termOrder: Term expiry must be after term start.
validation.outsiderBlock: This update would exceed the 25% outsider limit.

documents.uploadMock: Upload and download actions are placeholders in this frontend phase.

sources.formC: Source: Form C and Members List. CNIC is masked in display views.
sources.formASchedule1: Source: Form A Schedule 1. Outsider office bearers must stay within the 25% threshold.
sources.annualReturn: Source: Annual Return / Saalana Goshwara Form L.
sources.resolution: Source: Resolution and Khalfiya Biyan packet.
sources.documents: Sources: official PUWF legal forms, governance docs, affiliation packet and DMS requirements.

sources.finance: Source: FIN-001 dues, employer remittance and Annual Return finance prefill.
sources.election: Source: Election Schedule-1 and NGC Nomination Form.
sources.grievanceLegal: Source: grievance SLA, legal case management and hearing logs.
sources.approval: Source: Annual Return GS/FS approval workflow.

finance.subtitle: Dues, remittances, receipts and annual return prefill

annual.subtitle: Form L/J statutory annual return wizard

elections.subtitle: Schedule, nominations, voter readiness and results

manifesto.service: Focus on field service counters and grievance response.
manifesto.finance: Focus on transparent receipts and welfare fund records.
manifesto.legal: Focus on legal evidence, hearings and worker representation.

wages.title: Wage revision demand
wages.justification: Demand linked to inflation, overtime and wage parity evidence.

allowance.title: Risk and field allowance
allowance.justification: Allowance needed for field operations, safety risk and night duty.

safety.title: Safety equipment and duty conditions
safety.justification: Demand covers PPE, rest areas and safe equipment standards.

timeline.draftBody: Union office prepared demand categories and evidence packet.
timeline.responseBody: Prepare conciliation packet if response is not satisfactory.

hearings.agendaEvidence: Evidence packet and employer response review.
hearings.agendaNotice: Notice, parties and first appearance preparation.

validation.balanceEquation: Income must equal expenditure plus closing balance.

dashboard.idAction: Show masked ID and QR placeholder
dashboard.moreAction: Open vote, rights, union profile, and notices

more.subtitle: Worker services
more.vote: Election availability, candidates, OTP and ballot confirmation.
more.rights: Plain-language rights library in Urdu and English.
more.union: Union profile, office bearers, CBA status and documents.
more.notifications: Grouped notices for dues, grievances, elections and rights.

dues.employerDeduction: Employer deduction is marked as collected but remittance is still pending confirmation.
dues.overdueBody: You have {{outstanding}} overdue month(s). Contact the Finance Secretary immediately to avoid membership suspension.
dues.pendingBody: {{outstanding}} month(s) pending — employer deduction should process by month end.
dues.paidUp: All dues are paid up to date.
dues.noReceiptDesc: No receipt issued yet. Employer deduction is processed in bulk.
dues.disputeSuccess: Dispute submitted — Ref: {{ref}}. Union Admin will review within 3 working days.

timeline.submittedBody: Worker complaint was recorded in intake.
timeline.triageBody: Union desk is checking category and urgency.
timeline.investigatingBody: Assigned handler is collecting employer and worker details.

manifesto.service: Focus on grievance response, field visits, and worker service counters.
manifesto.finance: Focus on transparent dues receipts and welfare fund records.

unionRights.title: Union membership rights
unionRights.body: Workers can join a trade union, participate in collective bargaining, and contact their office bearers.

eobi.title: EOBI and social security
eobi.body: Eligible workers should be enrolled for old-age benefits and social security protection.

wages.title: Wages and overtime
wages.body: You can report unpaid wages, overtime, illegal deductions, or delayed employer remittance.

safety.title: Safety at work
safety.body: Unsafe work, missing protective equipment, or dangerous duty can be reported to the union.

termination.title: Termination or pressure
termination.body: If you are removed, threatened, or forced to resign, record the issue quickly with date and employer details.

cba.title: CBA and Charter of Demand
cba.body: A CBA union represents workers in bargaining and can raise demands through official negotiation stages.

notifications.cbaBody: Your union CBA certificate has an upcoming renewal checkpoint.
notifications.duesBody: April dues receipt is available as a preview.
notifications.grievanceBody: Your case moved to investigation in the timeline.
